creator: bartsch@dssgmbh.de
text:
Am Freitag, 23. Mai 2008 15:12 schrieben Sie:
> > Could you please send me more detailed information? Something like:
> >
> > - Complete install log (make install >& output_file)
> > - pkg_info
> >
> > Thanks
Thanks for reacting instantly.

The desired info is attached. Hopefully the attachment will not be eaten on 
its way.
In short what I did:
1. downloaded latest tarball from freebsd.org
2. integrated this port description into our ports tree
3. made a new ports index
4. portupgrade clamav
5. pkg_create -x -j -b clamav    --> failed 
6. pkg_delete -x clamav  --> removed dislocated manpage files manually
7. cd /usr/ports/security/clamav
8. make install  --> full log attached

some excerpts:
=========================================
...
config.status: executing depfiles commands
configure: WARNING:
****** WARNING:

****** Please be aware that this build may be badly broken.

At first sight I overlooked the configure warning. What is the exact reason 
for this warning? Am I missing something?
